name: tvm-financejs
when_to_use: 需要按 Excel 参数语义复算 PV/FV/PMT/NPER/RATE 等货币时间价值函数时用它而非手写,因为原生在 RATE 迭代求根、现金流正负号和期初期末付款语义上会失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到稳定求解内含利率 RATE,也经常把年利率误传给月度期数或反转 PV/PMT 符号；该库按 Excel 风格签名执行并保留未舍入结果。

data_in.note: data_in 精确映射到 Finance 实例的五个 TVM 方法；rate 必须是每期小数利率,例如月度 5.25% 年利率传 0.0525/12,pv 通常按 Excel 约定传负数。

schema.args: number[] —— 精确签名:PV=[rate,nper,pmt,fv?（默认 0）,type?（默认 0）],FV=[rate,nper,pmt,pv,type?（默认 0）],PMT=[rate,nper,pv,fv?（默认 0）,type?（默认 0）],NPER=[rate,pmt,pv,fv?（默认 0）,type?（默认 0）],RATE=[nper,pmt,pv,fv?（默认 0）,type?（默认 0）,guess?（默认 0.1）]；type=0 期末,type=1 期初

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵；上游是 CommonJS 公式引擎。
provides.outputs: PV/FV/PMT/NPER/RATE 的未舍入 number；某些不可解输入可能返回上游错误字符串,消费端须同时检查 Number.isFinite。

api_surface.rate: finance.RATE(nper, pmt, pv, fv = 0, type = 0, guess = 0.1)

peer.note: 本条只产 TVM 数值；参数扫描可交给 ECharts,逐期派生明细可交给 Grid.js,正负号提示由消费 AI 在界面层表达。

boot.artifact: unsupported:pick 将此上游标为 github-only 且 version=null；仓库 index.js 是 CommonJS,没有可按 pick 版本固定的浏览器原生 ESM URL。artifact 还必须保持 inferred-not-tested,不能偷偷改用未记录版本。
boot.widget: unsupported:pick 未固定 npm/version,GitHub CommonJS 源不能在 widget 里作为原生 ESM 直接导入；先固定发布版本或提供审计过的 ESM 包装。
boot.codex: unsupported:pick 未固定 npm/version；Codex 不应从浮动 master 安装。先把一个审计过的 commit/version 写回 pick,再以 package-manager import 调用 new Finance()。
boot.note: 保守校准:远端 registry 当前可见同名 0.3.0,但 picks 的 npm=null、version=null 是本条必须遵守的来源事实,因此这里不擅自把 0.3.0 写成已固定上游。

isolation.evidence: Headless CommonJS math engine (index.js: Finance.prototype.PV/FV/PMT/NPER/RATE + IPMT/PPMT/NPV/IRR, module.exports=Finance). Pure numeric computation, zero DOM/window/document access — trivially shadow-safe as it renders nothing.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to recompute time-value-of-money functions such as PV/FV/PMT/NPER/RATE with Excel parameter semantics, instead of writing them by hand, because native implementations fail at iterative RATE root finding, cash-flow signs, and beginning/end-of-period payment semantics.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reliably solve the implicit rate RATE by default and often passes an annual rate to monthly periods or reverses PV/PMT signs. This library executes Excel-style signatures and preserves unrounded results.

data_in.note: data_in maps exactly to five TVM methods on a Finance instance. rate must be the decimal rate per period; for example, pass a monthly 5.25% annual rate as 0.0525/12. pv is usually negative under Excel conventions.

schema.args: number[] -- Exact signatures: PV=[rate,nper,pmt,fv? (default 0),type? (default 0)], FV=[rate,nper,pmt,pv,type? (default 0)], PMT=[rate,nper,pv,fv? (default 0),type? (default 0)], NPER=[rate,pmt,pv,fv? (default 0),type? (default 0)], RATE=[nper,pmt,pv,fv? (default 0),type? (default 0),guess? (default 0.1)]; type=0 end of period, type=1 beginning of period
